module:
Base abstractions for tag extraction strategies.

This module defines the core interfaces for tag extraction
with standardized strategy patterns aligned with the Unified Registry System.

TagStrategyType.docstring: Enumeration of tag extraction strategy types for type-safe registration and usage.

TagCandidate.docstring:
Represents a tag candidate extracted from text.
    Contains the tag text, confidence score, and metadata.

TagExtractionStrategy.docstring:
Abstract base class for tag extraction strategies.
    
    All concrete tag extraction strategies must implement this interface
    to ensure consistent behavior across different implementations.

extract_tags.docstring:
Extract tags from text according to the strategy.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to extract tags from
            max_tags: Maximum number of tags to extract (optional)
            min_confidence: Minimum confidence threshold (optional)
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects

capabilities.docstring:
Get the capabilities of this tag extraction strategy.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities and their values

LinguisticTagConsumer.docstring:
Integration interface for consuming linguistic analysis for tagging.
    Establishes a formal boundary between tagging and linguistic subsystems.

capabilities.docstring:
Get declared capabilities of this linguistic consumer.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities with their supported values

consume_linguistic_units.docstring:
Convert linguistic units to tag candidates.
        
        Args:
            text: Text that was analyzed
            unit_types: Types of linguistic units to convert
            **options: Additional options
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects derived from linguistic analysis
